description: Fighting styles in the Roblox game (学乱) Gakuran, with rarity tier, official tier drop rates, and heavy-attack perks. Drop rates are the rarity tier's combined rate — the developers have not published a per-style split within a tier, so none is invented here.

styles.name: Kure
styles.heavyEffect: Last Stand: +15% total damage at ≤25% HP

styles.name: Capoeira
styles.heavyEffect: Ginga: 25% shorter dash cooldown; M2 knockdown

styles.name: Wrestling
styles.heavyEffect: Takedown: M2 grab throw for 1.5× damage, with hyperarmor

styles.name: Hakari
styles.heavyEffect: Momentum Rush: M2 deals 3× damage after a full M1 combo

styles.name: Boxing
styles.heavyEffect: Untouchable: M2 is a double hit with i-frames

styles.name: Muay Thai
styles.heavyEffect: Guard Pierce V + Resilience V: 30% chip, 55% grapple

styles.name: Slugger
styles.heavyEffect: Unstable: +30% damage dealt but +10% damage taken
